title: Pleasance
description: an apocalyptic state that’s wildly overgrown, decayed, zombie ridden, some odd years after a deadly pandemic has hit the US...
body:
# **PLEASANCE**
**FOR VERSION 1.16.5** & **1.18.2**

**PLEASANCE** is my take on a well known apocalyptic modpack off the technic modloader called [**The Crafting Dead**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/crafting-dead-legacy-origins) originally created by _f3rullo_, most of all the core mechanics return: corpses, thirst, bleeding, tearing clothes for rags, broken legs, or infection.
Heart system has been changed, horses stand in place, leaves fall off trees, many small visual changes for third person. Now you have to fill a canteen, make a backpack, butcher animal carcass for food. Sniper barrels and glocks. Zombies and hordes.

Designed around custom maps I´ve been incrementally developing & building on, specifically for this modpack, links will go public ASAP with no estimated release, which will greatly enhance the curated set of mods this pack provides.

**CONTROLS**
```
[TAB] Equipment Inventory
[E] Inventory
[R] Reload
[T] Unload
[X] Firemode toggle
[Z] Zoom
[C] Modify attachments (Crayfish & Tac)
[U] Player death history
[2] Inspect; while holding gun
[ENTER] Chat
[F6] JEI HUD toggle
```

### MODLIST & CREDITS

**SHOUTOUT TO EVERY MOD, RESOURCEPACK & SHADERPACK CREATOR, THIS CURATED MODPACK WOULDN'T EXIST WITHOUT THEIR HARDWORK, PLEASE CHECK OUT ALL THESE PAGES AND THE AUTHOR'S WORKS!** **PLEASE CONSIDER DOWNLOADING THE MODS THAT COULDN'T BE EMBEDDED DUE TO MODRINTH POLICIES, THAT WILL PROVIDE THE FULL INTENDED EXPERIENCE.**

**ORIGINAL MODLIST**

**RESOURCES**
- [Bee's Fancy Crops](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fancy-crops) c: bebebea_loste
- [Complementary](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-unbound) c: emingt

**NOTE**: recommend 4-6GB of RAM allocated

**NOTE**: the original version of this was hosted over on technic and due to it being dated back to 1.16.5, modrinth didn't exist and that is why there are so many curseforge download links, some of the creators have pages for the mods on modrinth but they are not displaying these versions which is why the first link will be where the mod was retrieved from <3 which is curse forge and i tried my best to provide the alternative links for modrinth to support the creator on these pages as well.

**1.16 KNOWN BUGS**
- BUG: (visual) CD texture rendering issue on guns/armor; appears without shaders & causes crashes with shaders; this is the biggest present issue
- BUG: (visual) fog change glitch between 116-138 y if fog is enabled
- BUG: rarely astikor carts has caused a crash
